createTeam.title: Create a New Team
createTeam.tipTrans: <0>Tip:</0> For more advanced team creation (with roles, skills, and auto-hiring), just tell your <1>Secretary</1> what kind of team you need.
createTeam.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this team work on?
createTeam.hint: You can add human and AI members to this team after creating it.

addHuman.title: Add Human Team Member
addHuman.name: Name *
addHuman.passwordSection: Set a password to allow this person to log in.
addHuman.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank for no login access
addHuman.emailRequired: Email is required when setting a password
addHuman.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
addHuman.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

addExisting.title: Add Existing Member to Team
addExisting.hint: Select an ungrouped member to add to this team.
addExisting.allInTeam: All members are already in a team.

openClaw.title: Import OpenClaw Agent
openClaw.description: Register an OpenClaw agent to join your Markus organization. After registration, you'll get a ready-to-use connection config.
openClaw.copyInstruction: Copy this prompt and paste it into your OpenClaw agent, Cursor, or any AI assistant.

deleteTeam.message: This team will be removed from the database. Check options below to also delete members and disk files.
deleteTeam.deleteMembers: Also delete all members in this team
deleteTeam.purgeFiles: Also delete disk files (workspace, memory, logs)

removeFromTeam.title: Remove from team?
removeFromTeam.message: This member will be moved to Ungrouped.

removeAgent.message: This agent will be removed from the database. Check the option below to also delete its workspace, memory, and other files from disk.
removeAgent.purgeFiles: Also delete disk files (workspace, memory, logs)

pauseAll.title: Pause All Agents
pauseAll.message: All agents will be paused. Events will still enter the mailbox but will not be processed. In-progress tasks will be blocked.

resumeAll.title: Resume All Agents
resumeAll.message: All agents will resume processing events from their mailbox.

notifications.rejectReasonPlaceholder: Reason for rejection (optional, Enter to submit)

intro.ja: 自己紹介をしてください

errors.ai402: ⚠ AI service error: {{detail}}. Please top up the API balance or contact your administrator.
errors.ai401: ⚠ AI service authentication failed: {{detail}}. Please check the configuration.
errors.ai429: ⚠ Rate limit exceeded: {{detail}}. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.ai503: ⚠ AI service unavailable: {{detail}}. Please try again later.

page.emptySelectAgent: Select an agent from the sidebar to start.
page.attachFilesTitle: Attach files (images, PDF, Word, Excel, PowerPoint...)
page.visionWarning: Images will be converted to text (model does not support vision)

placeholder.noAgent: Select an agent to start chatting

page.retryConfirmSingular: This will discard one message after this point and re-generate. Continue?
page.retryConfirmPlural: This will discard {{count}} messages after this point and re-generate. Continue?
page.workingOnTaskHint: Working on task · Click to view
page.agentErrorFallback: Agent encountered an error. Check profile for details.
